workOrder.fallback: display the work-order identifier and available evidence inside Monitor

materialReservation.fallback: display the reservation and work-order identifiers with available evidence inside Monitor

rules: GraphQL operations are data APIs, not browser navigation routes.
Never infer a browser route from a GraphQL operation name.
Render identifiers and evidence, but no EmusaSoft navigation action.
A future navigation adapter requires a new supported EmusaSoft contract and contract tests.
